text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Wooooo! I'm so happy, I could explode! That was
the best festival eveeer!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I can't stop crying! Whoever thought up gathering
all these Umadols into one amusement park is a
certified genius!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I'm hungry... I guess while I was practicing my
light stick moves I should have been eating. Ugh,
I really need to get something in my belly...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Huh?! Ohhhh, a figure as insanely beautiful as
that can only be...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Oh, don't we go to the same school?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
(Yooogkljsh! She's actually talking to me! She
knows I exist! Eeeeek!)

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Are you here to watch my spontaneous
photoshoot?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
I only announced it a second ago... How are fans
showing up already?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
I couldn't believe my agency when they told me
about the plan, but I have to do my best,
regardless.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Anyways, my manager's waiting for me.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
What? Huh? WHAAAT?! Waitwaitwaitwait! I can't
process all this information!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Ahhhhh! I can't go eat at a time like this!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After that, Agnes Digital takes advantage of the
unexpected opportunity and goes to support
another of her oshis. Thanks to the unexpected
simp ses—high intensity workout, she manages to
get back in shape.
